title: Zero In Ultra Power Outdoor Fly Trap Refill Sachet – 8g x 6 Fly Attractant Outdoor Use Poison-Free
features: FOR BIG FLY PROBLEMS: Like the professionals use
POISON-FREE REFILL: Super effective fly attractant refill for Ultimate Outdoor Fly Trap and XL Outdoor Fly Trap
SEASON-LONG REFILL PACK: Includes 8g x 6 sachets
FOR OUTDOOR USE: Attracts flies up to 10m radius Ideal for gardens, smallholdings, refuse areas, stables and barns
READY-TO-USE: Just add water to activate
PROVEN-EFFECTIVE: Continuous outdoor fly control keeps working for at least 4 weeks
description: From the manufacturer GET PROFESSIONAL RESULTS Packed full of professional-quality insect control solutions, the premium range of Ultra Power products from Zero In delivers fast and effective control of flying and crawling insects, including household pests such as bed bugs, cockroaches and clothes moths. Guaranteed results Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Ultra Power Fly Trap Bait Refill For BIG fly problems Fly Trap Bait Refill from Zero In Ultra Power is a super-effective attractant for use with Zero In Ultra Power XL Outdoor Fly Trap. This specially-formulated attractant will lure flies within a 10 metre radius, creating a protected zone of over 300 square metres. This poison-free formula is ideal for gardens, refuse areas, stables and smallholdings. Specially-formulated attractant will lure in flies within a 10 metre radius, creating a protected zone of over 300 square metres. Developed and used by professional pest control operators. Poison-free formula - ideal for gardens, refuse areas, stables and smallholdings. Season-long refill pack - contains 6 x 8g sachets For use with Zero In Ultra Power XL Outdoor Fly Trap and Zero In Ultra Power Ultimate Outdoor Fly Trap. Part of the ULTRA POWER range. For BIG pest problems. Product Highlights Developed By Professionals This unique formula has been developed by professional pest control operators to maximise catch rate for effective control of large fly infestations. 300m² Fly-Free Zone Specially-formulated for fast and effective control, the bait attractant will lure flies within a 10 metre radius providing a protected zone of over 300 square metres. Poison-Free Poison-free formula – ideal for gardens, refuse areas, stables and smallholdings. Eliminate flies without the need for poisons or nasty chemicals. Lasting Protection When used with Zero In Ultra Power Outdoor XL Fly Trap, each sachet will provide continuous protection against flies for over 4 weeks.
